    64→  local z_known="RBRR_REGISTRY_OWNER RBRR_REGISTRY_NAME RBRR_VESSEL_DIR RBRR_DNS_SERVER RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME RBRR_DEPLOY_MACHINE_NAME RBRR_CRANE_TAR_GZ RBRR_MANIFEST_PLATFORMS RBRR_CHOSEN_PODMAN_VERSION RBRR_CHOSEN_VMIMAGE_ORIGIN RBRR_CHOSEN_IDENTITY RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID RBRR_GCP_REGION RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS RBRR_GOVERNOR_RBRA_FILE RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE RBRR_GCB_GCRANE_IMAGE_REF RBRR_GCB_ORAS_IMAGE_REF RBRR_GCB_GCLOUD_IMAGE_REF RBRR_GCB_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF RBRR_GCB_SKOPEO_IMAGE_REF RBRR_GCB_ALPINE_IMAGE_REF RBRR_GCB_SYFT_IMAGE_REF RBRR_GCB_BINFMT_IMAGE_REF"
    65→  ZRBRR_UNEXPECTED=()
    66→  local z_var
    67→  for z_var in $(compgen -v RBRR_); do
    68→    case " ${z_known} " in
    69→      *" ${z_var} "*) : ;;
    70→      *) ZRBRR_UNEXPECTED+=("${z_var}") ;;
    71→    esac
    72→  done
    73→
    74→  # Build rollup of all RBRR_ variables for passing to scripts/containers
    75→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP=""
    76→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_REGISTRY_OWNER='${RBRR_REGISTRY_OWNER}' "
    77→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_REGISTRY_NAME='${RBRR_REGISTRY_NAME}' "
    78→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_VESSEL_DIR='${RBRR_VESSEL_DIR}' "
    79→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_DNS_SERVER='${RBRR_DNS_SERVER}' "
    80→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME='${RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME}' "
    81→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_DEPLOY_MACHINE_NAME='${RBRR_DEPLOY_MACHINE_NAME}' "
    82→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_CRANE_TAR_GZ='${RBRR_CRANE_TAR_GZ}' "
    83→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_MANIFEST_PLATFORMS='${RBRR_MANIFEST_PLATFORMS}' "
    84→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_CHOSEN_PODMAN_VERSION='${RBRR_CHOSEN_PODMAN_VERSION}' "
    85→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_CHOSEN_VMIMAGE_ORIGIN='${RBRR_CHOSEN_VMIMAGE_ORIGIN}' "
    86→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_CHOSEN_IDENTITY='${RBRR_CHOSEN_IDENTITY}' "
    87→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID='${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}' "
    88→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_GCP_REGION='${RBRR_GCP_REGION}' "
    89→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY='${RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY}' "
    90→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE='${RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE}' "
    91→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT='${RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT}' "
    92→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_GOVERNOR_RBRA_FILE='${RBRR_GOVERNOR_RBRA_FILE}' "
    93→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE='${RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}' "
    94→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE='${RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}' "
    95→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_GCB_GCRANE_IMAGE_REF='${RBRR_GCB_GCRANE_IMAGE_REF}' "
    96→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_GCB_ORAS_IMAGE_REF='${RBRR_GCB_ORAS_IMAGE_REF}' "
    97→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_GCB_GCLOUD_IMAGE_REF='${RBRR_GCB_GCLOUD_IMAGE_REF}' "
    98→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_GCB_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF='${RBRR_GCB_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF}' "
    99→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_GCB_SKOPEO_IMAGE_REF='${RBRR_GCB_SKOPEO_IMAGE_REF}' "
   100→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_GCB_ALPINE_IMAGE_REF='${RBRR_GCB_ALPINE_IMAGE_REF}' "
   101→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_GCB_SYFT_IMAGE_REF='${RBRR_GCB_SYFT_IMAGE_REF}' "
   102→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_GCB_BINFMT_IMAGE_REF='${RBRR_GCB_BINFMT_IMAGE_REF}'"
   103→
   104→  # Build docker env args array for container injection
   105→  # Usage: docker run "${ZRBRR_DOCKER_ENV[@]}" ...
   106→  # Currently only RBRR_DNS_SERVER is needed by sentry; add others as needed
   107→  ZRBRR_DOCKER_ENV=()
   108→  ZRBRR_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRR_DNS_SERVER=${RBRR_DNS_SERVER}")
   109→
   110→  ZRBRR_KINDLED=1
   111→}
   112→
   113→zrbrr_sentinel() {
   114→  test "${ZRBRR_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbrr not kindled - call zrbrr_broach first"
   115→}
   116→
   117→# Validate RBRR variables via buv_env_* (dies on first error)
   118→# Prerequisite: broach must have been called; buv_validation.sh must be sourced
   119→zrbrr_validate_fields() {
   120→  zrbrr_sentinel
   121→
   122→  # Die on unexpected variables
   123→  if test ${#ZRBRR_UNEXPECTED[@]} -gt 0; then
   124→    buc_die "Unexpected RBRR_ variables: ${ZRBRR_UNEXPECTED[*]}"
   125→  fi
   126→
   127→  # Container Registry Configuration
   128→  buv_env_xname       RBRR_REGISTRY_OWNER          2     64
   129→  buv_env_xname       RBRR_REGISTRY_NAME           2     64
   130→  buv_env_string      RBRR_VESSEL_DIR              1    255
   131→  buv_env_ipv4        RBRR_DNS_SERVER
   132→
   133→  # Machine Configuration
   134→  buv_env_xname       RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME     1     64
   135→  buv_env_xname       RBRR_DEPLOY_MACHINE_NAME     1     64
   136→  buv_env_string      RBRR_CRANE_TAR_GZ            1    512
   137→  buv_env_string      RBRR_MANIFEST_PLATFORMS      1    512
   138→  buv_env_string      RBRR_CHOSEN_PODMAN_VERSION   1     16
   139→  buv_env_fqin        RBRR_CHOSEN_VMIMAGE_ORIGIN   1    256
   140→  buv_env_string      RBRR_CHOSEN_IDENTITY         1    128
   141→  buv_env_gname       RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID          6     63
   142→  buv_env_gname       RBRR_GCP_REGION              1     32
   143→
   144→  # Google Artifact Registry Configuration
   145→  buv_env_gname       RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY          1     63
   146→
   147→  # Google Cloud Build Configuration
   148→  buv_env_string      RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE        3     64
   149→  buv_env_string      RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT             2     10
   150→
   151→  # Service Account Configuration Files
   152→  buv_env_string      RBRR_GOVERNOR_RBRA_FILE         1    512
   153→  buv_env_string      RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE     1    512
   154→  buv_env_string      RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE      1    512
   155→
   156→  # GCB image pins (digest-pinned)
   157→  buv_env_odref       RBRR_GCB_GCRANE_IMAGE_REF
   158→  buv_env_odref       RBRR_GCB_ORAS_IMAGE_REF
   159→  buv_env_odref       RBRR_GCB_GCLOUD_IMAGE_REF
   160→  buv_env_odref       RBRR_GCB_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF
   161→  buv_env_odref       RBRR_GCB_SKOPEO_IMAGE_REF
   162→  buv_env_odref       RBRR_GCB_ALPINE_IMAGE_REF
   163→  buv_env_odref       RBRR_GCB_SYFT_IMAGE_REF
   164→  buv_env_odref       RBRR_GCB_BINFMT_IMAGE_REF
   165→
   166→  # Validate directories exist
   167→  buv_dir_exists "${RBRR_VESSEL_DIR}"
   168→
   169→  # Validate manifest platforms format (space-separated identifiers)
   170→  local z_platform=""
   171→  for z_platform in ${RBRR_MANIFEST_PLATFORMS}; do
   172→    if ! printf '%s' "${z_platform}" | grep -q '^[a-z0-9_]\+$'; then
   173→      buc_warn "Invalid platform format in RBRR_MANIFEST_PLATFORMS: ${z_platform}"
   174→      buc_step "Expected format: lowercase alphanumeric with underscores"
   175→      buc_die "Invalid RBRR_MANIFEST_PLATFORMS"
   176→    fi
   177→  done
   178→
   179→  # Validate timeout format (number followed by 's' for seconds)
   180→  if ! printf '%s' "${RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT}" | grep -q '^[0-9]\+s$'; then
   181→    buc_warn "Invalid RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT format: ${RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT}"
   182→    buc_step "Expected format: number followed by 's' (e.g., 1200s)"
   183→    buc_die "Invalid RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT"
   184→  fi
   185→
   186→  # Validate Podman version format (e.g., 5.5 or 5.5.1)
   187→  if ! printf '%s' "${RBRR_CHOSEN_PODMAN_VERSION}" | grep -q '^[0-9]\+\.[0-9]\+\(\.[0-9]\+\)\?$'; then
   188→    buc_warn "Invalid RBRR_CHOSEN_PODMAN_VERSION format: ${RBRR_CHOSEN_PODMAN_VERSION}"
   189→    buc_step "Expected format: semantic version like 5.5 or 5.5.1"
   190→    buc_die "Invalid RBRR_CHOSEN_PODMAN_VERSION"
   191→  fi
   192→}
   193→
   194→######################################################################
   195→# Public Functions (rbrr_*)
   196→
   197→# Load RBRR regime
   198→# Usage: rbrr_load
   199→# Uses RBCC_RBRR_FILE to locate rbrr_RecipeBottleRegimeRepo.sh, verifies exists, sources, broaches, and validates
   200→rbrr_load() {
   201→  local z_rbrr_file="${RBCC_RBRR_FILE}"
   202→  test -f "${z_rbrr_file}" || buc_die "RBRR config not found: ${z_rbrr_file}"
   203→
   204→  source "${z_rbrr_file}" || buc_die "Failed to source RBRR config: ${z_rbrr_file}"
   205→  zrbrr_broach
   206→  zrbrr_validate_fields
   207→}

    79→# Service Account Configuration - RBRA (Recipe Bottle Regime Auth) Format
    80→#
    81→# RBRA files are bash-sourceable environment files containing extracted 
    82→# Google service account credentials. No JSON parsing required at runtime.
    83→#
    84→# Required RBRA environment variables:
    85→#   RBRA_CLIENT_EMAIL       - Service account email (e.g., sa-name@project.iam.gserviceaccount.com)
    86→#   RBRA_PRIVATE_KEY        - RSA private key in PEM format (includes newlines as \n)
    87→#   RBRA_PROJECT_ID         - GCP project ID for context
    88→#   RBRA_TOKEN_LIFETIME_SEC - OAuth token lifetime in seconds (300-3600)
    89→#
    90→# Security notes:
    91→#   - RBRA files contain raw credentials - protect like passwords
    92→#   - Never commit RBRA files to version control
    93→#   - Use shortest reasonable TOKEN_LIFETIME_SEC for each role
    94→#
    95→# Service accounts by role:
    96→#
    97→# 1. Pull/list container images
    98→RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE=../station-files/secrets/rbra-retriever.env
    99→#    Permissions: roles/artifactregistry.reader
   100→#    Token lifetime: 300 seconds (quick pulls)
   101→#
   102→# 2. Submit Cloud Build image jobs, delete images
   103→RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE=../station-files/secrets/rbra-director.env
   104→#    Permissions: roles/cloudbuild.builds.editor + storage.admin on staging
   105→#    Token lifetime: 600 seconds (build submission)
   106→#
   107→# 3. GOVERNOR
   108→RBRR_GOVERNOR_RBRA_FILE=../station-files/secrets/rbra-governor.env
   109→#    Permissions: roles/owner (FULL PROJECT CONTROL)
   110→#    Token lifetime: 1800 seconds (complex setup operations)
   111→

    18→#
    19→# RBRR CLI - Command line interface for RBRR repo regime operations
    20→
    21→set -euo pipefail
    22→
    23→ZRBRR_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR="${BASH_SOURCE[0]%/*}"
    24→
    25→# Source dependencies
    26→source "${ZRBRR_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/../buk/buc_command.sh"
    27→source "${ZRBRR_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/../buk/buv_validation.sh"
    28→source "${ZRBRR_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbrr_regime.sh"

    31→
    32→######################################################################
    33→# CLI Functions
    34→
    35→zrbrr_cli_kindle() {
    36→  test -z "${ZRBRR_CLI_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "RBRR CLI already kindled"
    37→
    38→  # GCB runs on linux/amd64 — pin digests must match this platform
    39→  ZRBRR_CLI_PIN_OS="linux"
    40→  ZRBRR_CLI_PIN_ARCH="amd64"
    41→
    42→  ZRBRR_CLI_KINDLED=1
    43→}
    44→
    45→# Command: validate - source file and validate (dies on first error)
    46→rbrr_validate() {
    47→  local z_file="${1:-}"
    48→  test -n "${z_file}" || buc_die "rbrr_validate: file argument required"
    49→  test -f "${z_file}" || buc_die "rbrr_validate: file not found: ${z_file}"
    50→
    51→  buc_step "Validating RBRR repo regime file: ${z_file}"
    52→
    53→  # Use rbrr_load for standardized loading
    54→  rbrr_load
    55→
    56→  buc_step "RBRR repo regime valid"
    57→}
    58→
    59→# Command: render - diagnostic display then validate
    60→rbrr_render() {
    61→  local z_file="${1:-}"
    62→  test -n "${z_file}" || buc_die "rbrr_render: file argument required"
    63→  test -f "${z_file}" || buc_die "rbrr_render: file not found: ${z_file}"
    64→
    65→  # Source and kindle (no dying — show all fields before validation)
    66→  source "${z_file}" || buc_die "rbrr_render: failed to source ${z_file}"
    67→  zrbrr_broach
    68→  zrbcr_kindle
    69→
    70→  # Display header
    71→  echo ""
    72→  echo "${ZBUC_WHITE}RBRR - Recipe Bottle Regime Repo${ZBUC_RESET}"
    73→  echo "${ZBUC_WHITE}File: ${z_file}${ZBUC_RESET}"
    74→  echo ""
    75→
    76→  # Container Registry Configuration
    77→  rbcr_section_begin "Container Registry Configuration"
    78→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_REGISTRY_OWNER  xname   req  "Container registry owner identifier"
    79→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_REGISTRY_NAME   xname   req  "Container registry name"
    80→  rbcr_section_end
    81→
    82→  # Vessel and Local Configuration
    83→  rbcr_section_begin "Vessel and Local Configuration"
    84→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_VESSEL_DIR              string  req  "Vessel definitions directory"
    85→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_DNS_SERVER              ipv4    req  "DNS server for containers"
    86→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME     xname   req  "Podman machine for ignite operations"
    87→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_DEPLOY_MACHINE_NAME     xname   req  "Podman machine for deploy operations"
    88→  rbcr_section_end
    89→
    90→  # Build Tool Configuration
    91→  rbcr_section_begin "Build Tool Configuration"
    92→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_CRANE_TAR_GZ            string  req  "Crane binary archive path"
    93→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_MANIFEST_PLATFORMS      string  req  "Target platforms for manifests"
    94→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_CHOSEN_PODMAN_VERSION   string  req  "Podman version (semantic version)"
    95→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_CHOSEN_VMIMAGE_ORIGIN   fqin    req  "VM image origin reference"
    96→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_CHOSEN_IDENTITY         string  req  "Identity for operations"
    97→  rbcr_section_end
    98→
    99→  # GCP Infrastructure
   100→  rbcr_section_begin "GCP Infrastructure"
   101→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID        gname   req  "GCP project ID for depot"
   102→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GCP_REGION              gname   req  "GCP region"
   103→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY          gname   req  "Google Artifact Registry repository name"
   104→  rbcr_section_end
   105→
   106→  # Google Cloud Build Configuration
   107→  rbcr_section_begin "Google Cloud Build Configuration"
   108→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE        string  req  "Machine type for Cloud Build"
   109→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT             string  req  "Build timeout (e.g., 1200s)"
   110→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS string req "Min concurrent builds required"
   111→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GCB_GCRANE_IMAGE_REF    odref   req  "gcrane image reference (digest-pinned)"

   113→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GCB_GCLOUD_IMAGE_REF    odref   req  "gcloud image reference (digest-pinned)"
   114→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GCB_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF    odref   req  "docker image reference (digest-pinned)"
   115→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GCB_SKOPEO_IMAGE_REF    odref   req  "skopeo image reference (digest-pinned)"
   116→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GCB_ALPINE_IMAGE_REF    odref   req  "alpine image reference (digest-pinned)"
   117→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GCB_SYFT_IMAGE_REF      odref   req  "syft image reference (digest-pinned)"
   118→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GCB_BINFMT_IMAGE_REF    odref   req  "binfmt image reference (digest-pinned)"
   119→  rbcr_section_end

   121→  # Service Account Configuration
   122→  rbcr_section_begin "Service Account Configuration"
   123→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GOVERNOR_RBRA_FILE      string  req  "Governor service account key file"
   124→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE     string  req  "Retriever service account key file"
   125→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE      string  req  "Director service account key file"
   126→  rbcr_section_end
   127→
   128→  # Unexpected variables (from kindle, not gated)
   129→  if test ${#ZRBRR_UNEXPECTED[@]} -gt 0; then
   130→    echo "${ZBUC_RED}Unexpected RBRR_ variables:${ZBUC_RESET}"
   131→    local z_var
   132→    for z_var in "${ZRBRR_UNEXPECTED[@]}"; do
   133→      printf "  ${ZBUC_RED}%-30s${ZBUC_RESET} = %s\n" "${z_var}" "${!z_var:-}"
   134→    done
   135→    echo ""
   136→  fi

   139→  zrbrr_validate_fields

   141→}
   142→
   143→# Command: refresh_gcb_pins - resolve image tags to digests and update RBRR file
   144→# Every step must succeed or the function dies — no partial updates.
   145→# Requires: docker, jq, curl, RBCC_RBRR_FILE set, BURD_NOW_STAMP set, BURD_TEMP_DIR set
   146→rbrr_refresh_gcb_pins() {
   147→  local z_rbrr_file="${RBCC_RBRR_FILE}"
   148→  test -f "${z_rbrr_file}" || buc_die "RBRR config not found: ${z_rbrr_file}"
   149→  test -n "${BURD_NOW_STAMP:-}" || buc_die "BURD_NOW_STAMP not set - must be called from BURD"
   150→  test -d "${BURD_TEMP_DIR:-}" || buc_die "BURD_TEMP_DIR not set or not a directory"
   151→
   152→  buc_countdown 5 "NOTE: Docker anonymous login is heavily rate limited.  Try again in 6 hours if you see that fail.  Continuing in:"
   153→
   154→  local z_vintage="${BURD_NOW_STAMP}"
   155→  local z_oras_token_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbrr_oras_token.json"
   156→  local z_oras_tags_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbrr_oras_tags.json"
   157→  local z_oras_token_value_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbrr_oras_token_value.txt"
   158→  local z_oras_tag_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbrr_oras_tag.txt"
   159→  local z_refresh_prefix="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbrr_refresh_"
   160→  local z_refresh_sed_prefix="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbrr_refresh_sed_"
   161→
   162→  # Discover latest oras stable version from GHCR API.
   163→  # oras doesn't publish a :latest tag, so we must find the newest semver release.
   164→  # GHCR requires a bearer token even for public images.
   165→  buc_step "Discovering latest oras version from GHCR (no :latest tag published)"
   166→
   167→  buc_log_args "Obtaining GHCR bearer token (anonymous, scoped to oras repo)"
   168→  curl -sS \
   169→    "https://ghcr.io/token?scope=repository:oras-project/oras:pull&service=ghcr.io" \
   170→    -o "${z_oras_token_file}" 2>/dev/null \
   171→    || buc_die "Failed to fetch GHCR bearer token"
   172→
   173→  jq -r '.token // empty' "${z_oras_token_file}" > "${z_oras_token_value_file}" \
   174→    || buc_die "Failed to extract token from GHCR response"
   175→  local z_oras_token
   176→  z_oras_token=$(<"${z_oras_token_value_file}")
   177→  test -n "${z_oras_token}" || buc_die "GHCR returned empty bearer token"
   178→
   179→  buc_log_args "Fetching tag list using bearer token"
   180→  curl -sS \
   181→    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_oras_token}" \
   182→    "https://ghcr.io/v2/oras-project/oras/tags/list?n=1000" \
   183→    -o "${z_oras_tags_file}" 2>/dev/null \
   184→    || buc_die "Failed to fetch oras tags from GHCR"
   185→
   186→  buc_log_args "Extracting newest stable semver tag"
   187→  # Filters to exact vN.N.N (no pre-release suffixes), sorts numerically, takes last
   188→  jq -r '
   189→    [.tags[] | select(test("^v[0-9]+\\.[0-9]+\\.[0-9]+$"))]
   190→    | map(ltrimstr("v") | split(".") | map(tonumber))
   191→    | sort_by(.[0], .[1], .[2])
   192→    | last
   193→    | "v\(.[0]).\(.[1]).\(.[2])"
   194→  ' "${z_oras_tags_file}" > "${z_oras_tag_file}" \
   195→    || buc_die "Failed to extract semver tag from oras tags response"
   196→  local z_oras_tag
   197→  z_oras_tag=$(<"${z_oras_tag_file}")
   198→  test -n "${z_oras_tag}" -a "${z_oras_tag}" != "null" \
   199→    || buc_die "No stable oras semver tag found in GHCR tag list"
   200→  buc_info "oras discovered tag: ${z_oras_tag}"
   201→
   202→  # Image specifications: VARNAME|BASE_IMAGE|TAG
   203→  # Most images use :latest which always points to newest version.
   204→  # oras uses discovered semver tag above (no :latest published).
   205→  local z_specs=(
   206→    "RBRR_GCB_GCRANE_IMAGE_REF|gcr.io/go-containerregistry/gcrane|latest"
   207→    "RBRR_GCB_ORAS_IMAGE_REF|ghcr.io/oras-project/oras|${z_oras_tag}"
   208→    "RBRR_GCB_GCLOUD_IMAGE_REF|gcr.io/cloud-builders/gcloud|latest"
   209→    "RBRR_GCB_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF|gcr.io/cloud-builders/docker|latest"
   210→    "RBRR_GCB_SKOPEO_IMAGE_REF|quay.io/skopeo/stable|latest"
   211→    "RBRR_GCB_ALPINE_IMAGE_REF|docker.io/library/alpine|latest"
   212→    "RBRR_GCB_SYFT_IMAGE_REF|docker.io/anchore/syft|latest"
   213→    "RBRR_GCB_BINFMT_IMAGE_REF|docker.io/tonistiigi/binfmt|latest"
   214→  )
   215→
   216→  buc_step "Refreshing GCB tool image pins (vintage: ~${z_vintage})"
   217→
   218→  local z_updated=0
   219→  local z_unchanged=0
   220→
   221→  local z_spec=""
   222→  local z_varname=""
   223→  local z_image=""
   224→  local z_tag=""
   225→  local z_manifest_file=""
   226→  local z_digest_file=""
   227→  local z_oldref_file=""
   228→  local z_digest=""
   229→  local z_full_ref=""
   230→  local z_old_ref=""
   231→  local z_sed_value_file=""
   232→  local z_sed_vintage_file=""
   233→  for z_spec in "${z_specs[@]}"; do
   234→    IFS='|' read -r z_varname z_image z_tag <<< "${z_spec}"
   235→
   236→    z_manifest_file="${z_refresh_prefix}${z_varname}_manifest.json"
   237→    z_digest_file="${z_refresh_prefix}${z_varname}_digest.txt"
   238→    z_oldref_file="${z_refresh_prefix}${z_varname}_oldref.txt"
   239→    z_sed_value_file="${z_refresh_sed_prefix}${z_varname}_value.sh"
   240→    z_sed_vintage_file="${z_refresh_sed_prefix}${z_varname}_vintage.sh"
   241→
   242→    buc_step "Inspecting ${z_image}:${z_tag}"
   243→
   244→    docker manifest inspect --verbose "${z_image}:${z_tag}" > "${z_manifest_file}" 2>/dev/null \
   245→      || buc_die "Failed to fetch manifest for ${z_image}:${z_tag}"
   246→
   247→    buc_log_args "Extracting ${ZRBRR_CLI_PIN_OS}/${ZRBRR_CLI_PIN_ARCH} digest from manifest"
   248→    jq -r --arg os "${ZRBRR_CLI_PIN_OS}" --arg arch "${ZRBRR_CLI_PIN_ARCH}" '
   249→      if type == "array" then
   250→        [.[] | select(.Descriptor.platform.architecture == $arch
   251→                  and .Descriptor.platform.os == $os)][0].Descriptor.digest
   252→      else
   253→        .Descriptor.digest
   254→      end' \
   255→      "${z_manifest_file}" > "${z_digest_file}" \
   256→      || buc_die "Failed to extract digest for ${z_image}:${z_tag}"
   257→    z_digest=$(<"${z_digest_file}")
   258→    test -n "${z_digest}" || buc_die "Empty digest for ${z_image}:${z_tag}"
   259→    z_full_ref="${z_image}@${z_digest}"
   260→
   261→    grep "^${z_varname}=" "${z_rbrr_file}" | cut -d'"' -f2 > "${z_oldref_file}" \
   262→      || buc_die "No existing value for ${z_varname} in rbrr file"
   263→    z_old_ref=$(<"${z_oldref_file}")
   264→
   265→    if test "${z_old_ref}" = "${z_full_ref}"; then
   266→      buc_info "${z_varname}: unchanged"
   267→      z_unchanged=$((z_unchanged + 1))
   268→    else
   269→      buc_info "${z_varname}: ${z_old_ref} -> ${z_full_ref}"
   270→
   271→      sed "s|^${z_varname}=.*|${z_varname}=\"${z_full_ref}\"|" "${z_rbrr_file}" > "${z_sed_value_file}" \
   272→        || buc_die "Failed to sed value for ${z_varname}"
   273→      mv "${z_sed_value_file}" "${z_rbrr_file}" || buc_die "Failed to update ${z_varname} in rbrr file"
   274→
   275→      buc_log_args "Updating vintage comment for ${z_varname}"
   276→      sed "/${z_varname}=/{
   277→        x
   278→        s|(~[^)]*)|(~${z_vintage})|
   279→        x
   280→      }" "${z_rbrr_file}" > "${z_sed_vintage_file}" \
   281→        || buc_die "Failed to update vintage comment for ${z_varname}"
   282→      test -s "${z_sed_vintage_file}" || buc_die "Vintage sed produced empty output for ${z_varname}"
   283→      mv "${z_sed_vintage_file}" "${z_rbrr_file}" || buc_die "Failed to update vintage for ${z_varname}"
   284→
   285→      z_updated=$((z_updated + 1))
   286→    fi
   287→  done
   288→
   289→  buc_step "Refresh complete: ${z_updated} updated, ${z_unchanged} unchanged"
   290→}
   291→
   292→######################################################################
   293→# Main dispatch
   294→
   295→zrbrr_cli_kindle
   296→zrbcc_kindle
   297→
   298→z_command="${1:-}"
   299→
   300→case "${z_command}" in
   301→  validate|render)
   302→    z_file="${RBCC_RBRR_FILE}"
   303→    test -f "${z_file}" || buc_die "RBRR regime file not found: ${z_file}"
   304→    case "${z_command}" in
   305→      validate) rbrr_validate "${z_file}" ;;
   306→      render)   rbrr_render "${z_file}" ;;
   307→    esac
   308→    ;;
   309→  refresh_gcb_pins)
   310→    rbrr_refresh_gcb_pins
   311→    ;;
   312→  *)
   313→    buc_die "Unknown command: ${z_command}. Usage: rbrr_cli.sh {validate|render|refresh_gcb_pins}"
   314→    ;;
   315→esac
   316→
   317→# eof
   318→
